description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style toaster with a rugged, rectangular metal body painted in a worn yellow color, featuring significant patches of exposed metal and black scuff marks. The front panel is equipped with a control interface, including switches, indicator lights, and a prominent handle, suggesting robust functionality. The top surface has a large circular cap or lid, possibly for maintenance or cleaning, and is heavily weathered with chipped paint and stains. Both sides have sturdy handles for lifting or moving, and the base is supported by four rounded feet. The rear side features a large, dark vented section, likely for heat dissipation, and additional structural details. The overall design is utilitarian, built for heavy-duty use in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, industrial yellow toaster with heavy wear, control panel, and robust handles, designed for rugged urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the control panel with switches, indicator lights, and a handle, as well as the worn yellow paint and exposed metal.
description_view_1: Side view highlights a sturdy handle and the dark, vented section at the rear, with less visible control features.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain yellow back with patches of exposed metal and two recessed panels, lacking controls or vents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals another handle and a large, dark vented section, with the circular cap on top visible.
attribute_control_knobs: One black control knob on the front panel, round with a red indicator, labeled with settings.
